name: LLM
description: LLM-powered agents for code analysis and repository-aware reasoning

openai.label: OpenAI
openai.description: OpenAI API. Requires an API key. BASE_URL can point at any OpenAI-compatible server that requires authentication.

ollama.label: Ollama
ollama.description: Ollama local LLM server. No API key required. Set BASE_URL to your Ollama instance.

cursor_cli.label: Cursor CLI
cursor_cli.description: Executes prompts via the Cursor agent CLI. Requires Cursor to be installed and authenticated.

gemini_cli.label: Gemini CLI
gemini_cli.description: Executes prompts via the Gemini CLI. Requires the gemini CLI to be installed and authenticated.

google_vertex_ai.label: Google Vertex AI
google_vertex_ai.description: Uses LangChain's Vertex AI integration. Requires gcloud authentication.
